sql_array: CREATE TABLE user_keys (user VARCHAR(255), key_name VARCHAR(255), key_type VARCHAR(255), version INT, additional_info VARCHAR(255), key_blob VARBINARY);
INSERT INTO user_keys (user, key_name, key_type, version, additional_info, key_blob) VALUES ('admin', 'id_rsa', 'X.509', 2, '', xenc_pkcs12_export('id_rsa', 'CA Certificate', ''));
UPDATE user_keys SET version = version + 1 WHERE user = 'admin' AND key_name = 'id_rsa';
